# Information Technology SPDI Rules 2011

Jurisdiction: India
Region: IN
Citation: Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Data or Information) Rules, 2011
Authority: MeitY
Source URL: https://www.meity.gov.in/content/notification-sensitive-personal-data-or-information-rules-2011
Topics: sensitive_data, notice_transparency, consent, third_party_sharing, security_breach
Keywords: SPDI Rules, sensitive personal data or information, India IT Rules

## Summary
Indian rules under the IT Act for sensitive personal data or information and reasonable security practices.

## Key compliance obligations
- Publish privacy policy and obtain consent for SPDI collection.
- Restrict disclosure and transfer of SPDI.
- Maintain reasonable security practices.
